contexts.context: ...of Guiderius, that he has—"cut off one <mark>Cloten's</mark> head, son to the queen, and sent...
..., to tell his mother,"7 &c. Whoever <mark>Cloten</mark> was, or whatever ill he might threaten,—yet...
7.  Act IV, scene ii. <mark>Cloten</mark> is the son of Cymbeline with his second wife...
